events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the untooled/flush-struck joints are a workmanship defect (`installed-defective`, `non-compliant`) that creates a water entry path per TMS 602's joint-tooling requirement. Marked `fail` at `medium` risk since it's a durability/water-intrusion issue caught at rough stage, with corrective actions (re-tool while mortar is workable, rake-and-repoint hardened joints, hold sign-off until corrected).
